challenge.explanation: E-mail spominje na kraju da će učesnici primiti uputstva o tome kako pristupiti onlajn seminaru i kako će im biti poslato. Pročitajte poslednje redove e-maila kako biste mogli tačno da odgovorite na ovo pitanje.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Sophie priprema nacrt web pozivnice za onlajn seminar da ga pošalje na odobrenje Bobu.

Subject: Webinar on the Latest Trends in AI and LLMs – June 28, 4 PM

Dear colleagues and guests,

We are pleased to invite you to an upcoming webinar on Thursday, June 28 at 4:00 PM to explore the latest trends in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Large Language Models (LLMs).

This session is open to both internal team members and external participants, offering a chance to share insights and engage with a broader audience interested in emerging technologies.

Agenda Highlights:

  • Key developments in AI and LLMs

  • Real-world applications and impacts

  • Open Q&A with our experts

To help us manage attendance, please register using the link below. Once registered, you'll receive a confirmation with the webinar access details.

[Register Here]

We look forward to your participation!

Kako će učesnici znati da su uspešno se registrovali za onlajn seminar?

answers.feedback: Poziv ne pominje korišćenje Slaka niti bilo kog internog alata za poruke.
Nema objašnjenja o verifikaciji broja telefona u e-pošti.
Proces registracije je potpuno digitalan i ne zahteva štampane materijale.

answers.answer: Biće im dostavljena potvrda sa detaljima pristupa.

challenge.title: Vežba 151
